name: xiangqi
description: Xiangqi (Chinese Chess) game with AI - library module

scripts.skills:install-all: npm run skills:add:web-design && npm run skills:add:building-components && npm run skills:add:react-best-practices
scripts.skills:run:web-design: npx skills run vercel/web-design-guidelines --path src --output reports/report-web-design.json
scripts.skills:run:building-components: npx skills run vercel/building-components --path src --output reports/report-building-components.json
scripts.skills:run:react-best-practices: npx skills run vercel/vercel-react-best-practices --path src --output reports/report-react-best-practices.json
scripts.skills:run-all: npm run skills:run:web-design && npm run skills:run:building-components && npm run skills:run:react-best-practices
